title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature and its potential as an autonomous coder, comparing it to Ralph-loop 2.0. The video covers how the /goal feature works, its setup, prompting practices, goal-buddy functionality, and /Mission exploration for extended task execution.
